name: Swedish Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Prepare an ungreased baking sheet.
2. Sift together the flour, baking soda, spices, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large bowl of an electric mixer on high speed, beat the butter and 1 cup granulated sugar until light, about 1 minute. Add the egg and molasses; mix well. Stop the mixer and add the flour mixture. Mix just until combined.
4. Using about 1 1/2 teaspoons dough for each cookie, roll dough into balls. Roll in the remaining 1/2 cup granulated sugar so they are fully coated. Arrange on baking sheet, spacing them at least 2 inches apart.
5. Bake until set, 9 to 10 minutes. Transfer cookies to a wire rack and let cool.
